one_line_risk: Connector backend ships clean: SEC-RZ-H1 cleared — PCI card-field lint + C5 log-grep gate are now LIVE and independently re-proven non-inert (planted card_last4 fires; planted pay_/UTR fire exit 1; clean prod source passes; mapper 43/43); residual is one LOW dev-noise gap (log-grep scans FS not git, .terraform false-positive locally only — CI checkout unaffected).

tracked_findings.summary: log-grep-gate.mjs scans REPO_ROOT filesystem not git ls-files and does not exclude .terraform/; false-positives on a git-ignored Terraform provider binary locally, but that binary is absent from the CI actions/checkout so the CI gate is unaffected and non-inert. Recommend --exclude-dir=.terraform / -I / scan git ls-files. Non-blocking.

HMAC preceded by read-only JSON-parse + SECURITY DEFINER lookup + secret fetch (needed for per-connector webhook_secret); no side effect before HMAC so NN-4 holds, but unauthenticated DB/secret lookup is a minor DoS/account_id-enumeration surface. Platform follow-up: route rate-limit/WAF + uniform 401 timing.
upsert_razorpay_order_map documented as a DB fn but implemented as a brand-GUC repo UPSERT against the FORCE-RLS table; behavior correct, wording mismatch only. Non-blocking.
Real public webhook ingress is a platform follow-up (dev-honesty boundary, same as Shopify); proven via synthetic HMAC POSTs.

Root cause 'contract-bound mandatory CI gate ships as a file but is not registered/enforced' is occurrence #1 of a new pattern, distinct from the wired-to-nothing/fixture-coverage themes; below the >=3-distinct-run threshold. No rule-proposal filed. Codify if a second connector repeats it.
